image_prompt: A highly exaggerated, cartoonish illustration of a person mid-sneeze. Their head is thrown back, eyes closed tightly, and a comical burst of air and confetti-like particles explodes from their nose and mouth. The Portuguese onomatopoeia 'ATCHIM!' is prominently displayed in large, bubbly, colorful letters, seemingly erupting from their mouth. The short sentence 'O espirro faz "atchim!".' is playfully integrated as part of the expelled 'cloud' or written on a tissue box nearby. Vibrant, cheerful colors.
caption: A trilha sonora universal da rinite ou de um simples pozinho! 🤧😂 Não tem como negar, é um clássico! Qual o seu som óbvio favorito? Conta pra gente! #Atchim #Espirro #SonsDaVida #ObviedadesSonoras #HumorCotidiano
